hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "src/main/.*\.(java|yaml|yml)$" && echo "DOCUMENTATION SYNC REQUIRED: You just modified $FILE. Open root CLAUDE.md and check the ## Documentation Maintenance table — find the row whose trigger matches what you changed, then update every CLAUDE.md and README.md section listed in that row before closing this task." || true'
